members.name: GetParam
members.summary: Returns the value of the specified parameter.

members.name: SetParam
members.signature: public void SetParam(int param, float value)
members.summary: Sets the value of the specified parameter.

members.name: Bias
members.summary: The speed with which the swing or twist will take place. The higher, the faster.

members.name: Relaxation
members.summary: Defines, how fast the swing- and twist-speed-difference on both sides gets synced.

members.name: Softness
members.summary: The ease with which the joint starts to twist. If it's too low, it takes more force to start twisting the joint.

members.name: SwingSpan
members.summary: Swing is rotation from side to side, around the axis perpendicular to the twist axis. The swing span defines, how much rotation will not get corrected along the swing axis. Could be defined as looseness in the [ConeTwistJoint3D]. If below 0.05, this behavior is locked.

members.name: TwistSpan
members.summary: Twist is the rotation around the twist axis, this value defined how far the joint can twist. Twist is locked if below 0.05.

values.name: PARAM_TWIST_SPAN
values.summary: Twist is the rotation around the twist axis, this value defined how far the joint can twist. Twist is locked if below 0.05.
